company.name: Mapengo Innovations
company.tagline: Crafting Digital Excellence for South African Businesses

services.title: Web Development
services.description: Modern, performant websites and web applications built with React, Next.js, and cutting-edge technologies.

services.title: Mobile App Development
services.description: Cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android, delivering seamless user experiences.

services.title: UI/UX Design
services.description: Research-driven design that balances aesthetics with usability to create memorable digital experiences.

services.title: E-Commerce Solutions
services.description: Scalable online stores that convert visitors into customers, built for South African markets.

services.title: Systems Integration
services.description: Seamlessly connect your business tools, APIs, and third-party services for unified operations.

services.title: Cloud & Hosting
services.description: Scalable cloud infrastructure on AWS and Azure, with managed hosting and DevOps support.

services.title: IT Consulting
services.description: Strategic technology advisory to help South African businesses navigate digital transformation.

services.title: Maintenance & Support
services.description: Proactive monitoring, updates, and support to keep your digital products running smoothly.

projects.title: ShopZA Platform
projects.description: A full-featured e-commerce platform serving 50,000+ monthly shoppers across South Africa.

projects.title: MedConnect App
projects.description: Telemedicine mobile app connecting patients with doctors in underserved communities.

projects.title: CityFlow Dashboard
projects.description: Smart city analytics dashboard processing real-time data from IoT sensors.

projects.title: TaxEase Portal
projects.description: Tax management SaaS platform automating compliance for 500+ SMEs.

projects.title: Heritage Hotels Website
projects.description: Luxury hospitality website with booking integration and immersive storytelling.

projects.title: AgriTrack System
projects.description: Farm management platform tracking crops, livestock, and supply chain from field to market.

testimonials.name: Sipho Ndlovu
testimonials.text: Mapengo transformed our online presence. The ShopZA platform increased our revenue by 340% in the first year.

testimonials.name: Dr. Amina Patel
testimonials.text: The MedConnect app has helped us reach over 10,000 patients in rural areas. Mapengo's team understood our mission deeply.

testimonials.name: Lerato Dlamini
testimonials.text: Their technical expertise is world-class. The CityFlow dashboard handles millions of data points effortlessly.

team.name: Thabo Mokoena
team.bio: 15+ years in software engineering. Former tech lead at leading SA fintech companies.

team.name: Zanele Khumalo
team.bio: Award-winning UX designer with deep expertise in African market user research.

team.name: Mpho Sithole

team.name: Nomsa Dube
